name: Spicy Bean Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Finely chopped green chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Using a fork, mash the beans in a medium mixing bowl.
3. Add rice, egg substitute, bread crumbs, Mexican seasoning, ground red pepper, and salt to the mashed beans. Stir thoroughly to combine. Set aside.
4. Spray a small nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Heat over medium heat. Add diced red bell peppers, chopped scallions, finely chopped green chili peppers, and minced garlic. Cook, stirring frequently, until softened for about 1 minute.
5. Mix the cooked vegetables into the bean mixture.
6. Shape the bean mixture into 4 equal patties.
7. Spray a nonstick baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray and arrange the patties on the sheet.
8. If desired, brush each patty with 1/4 teaspoon of oil (this will add about 4 grams of fat per serving). Bake for 15 minutes.
9. Carefully turn each patty over and brush with another 1/4 teaspoon of oil. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes.
10. These patties can also be heated in a nonstick skillet sprayed with nonstick cooking spray. Be careful not to overcook.
